'''鈭歫-d-p''' ('''kajadap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whelm|whelm]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-d-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whelm|whelm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-d-p
|-
! Lemma
| kajadap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijadap|thijadap]] || [[word:jijadap|jijadap]] || [[word:shijadap|shijadap]] || [[word:kijadap|kijadap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujadap|thuthujadap]] || [[word:jujujadap|jujujadap]] || [[word:shushujadap|shushujadap]] || [[word:kukujadap|kukujadap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujadap|thujadap]] || [[word:jujadap|jujadap]] || [[word:shujadap|shujadap]] || [[word:kujadap|kujadap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujadap|thujadap]] || [[word:jujadap|jujadap]] || [[word:shujadap|shujadap]] || [[word:kujadap|kujadap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejadap|thejadap]] || [[word:jejadap|jejadap]] || [[word:shejadap|shejadap]] || [[word:kejadap|kejadap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojadap|thothojadap]] || [[word:jojojadap|jojojadap]] || [[word:shoshojadap|shoshojadap]] || [[word:kokojadap|kokojadap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojadap|thojadap]] || [[word:jojadap|jojadap]] || [[word:shojadap|shojadap]] || [[word:kojadap|kojadap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojadap|thojadap]] || [[word:jojadap|jojadap]] || [[word:shojadap|shojadap]] || [[word:kojadap|kojadap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jadap|th忙jadap]] || [[word:j忙jadap|j忙jadap]] || [[word:sh忙jadap|sh忙jadap]] || [[word:k忙jadap|k忙jadap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajadap|thathajadap]] || [[word:jajajadap|jajajadap]] || [[word:shashajadap|shashajadap]] || [[word:kakajadap|kakajadap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajadap|thajadap]] || [[word:jajadap|jajadap]] || [[word:shajadap|shajadap]] || [[word:kajadap|kajadap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajadap|thajadap]] || [[word:jajadap|jajadap]] || [[word:shajadap|shajadap]] || [[word:kajadap|kajadap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajadap|shajadap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajadap|goshajadap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajadap|gokishajadap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajadapn眉|shajadapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajadapnkn眉|goshajadapnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajadapn眉|gokishajadapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajadapsh毛|shajadapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajadapnksh毛|goshajadapnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajadapsh毛|gokishajadapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajadapro|shajadapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajadapnkro|goshajadapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajadapro|gokishajadapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajadapmu|shajadapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajadapnkmu|goshajadapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajadapmu|gokishajadapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajadapsher|shajadapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajadapnksher|goshajadapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajadapsher|gokishajadapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajadapng|shajadapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajadapnkng|goshajadapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajadapng|gokishajadapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajadapya|shajadapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajadapnkya|goshajadapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajadapya|gokishajadapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajadapyam|shajadapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajadapnkyam|goshajadapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajadapyam|gokishajadapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajadapn眉sh毛|shajadapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajadapnkn眉sh毛|goshajadapnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajadapn眉sh毛|gokishajadapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajadapn眉ro|shajadapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajadapnkn眉ro|goshajadapnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajadapn眉ro|gokishajadapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajadapn眉mu|shajadapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajadapnkn眉mu|goshajadapnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajadapn眉mu|gokishajadapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajadapsh毛n眉|shajadapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajadapnksh毛n眉|goshajadapnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajadapsh毛n眉|gokishajadapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajadapsh毛ro|shajadapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajadapnksh毛ro|goshajadapnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajadapsh毛ro|gokishajadapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajadapsh毛mu|shajadapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajadapnksh毛mu|goshajadapnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajadapsh毛mu|gokishajadapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajadapron眉|shajadapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajadapnkron眉|goshajadapnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajadapron眉|gokishajadapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajadaprosh毛|shajadaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajadapnkrosh毛|goshajadapnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajadaprosh毛|gokishajadaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajadapromu|shajadapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajadapnkromu|goshajadapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajadapromu|gokishajadapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajadapmun眉|shajadapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajadapnkmun眉|goshajadapnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajadapmun眉|gokishajadapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajadapmush毛|shajadapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajadapnkmush毛|goshajadapnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajadapmush毛|gokishajadapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajadapmuro|shajadapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajadapnkmuro|goshajadapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajadapmuro|gokishajadapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
